name: agentic-config-hub
description: Production-ready AI configurations for agents and agentic systems: 40 atomic skill packages, cs-* role agents, gated multi-agent workflows, and project context, anchored by the agentic-system-architect flagship with 4 loop-safety audit tools.

metadata.description: 40 production-ready agentic skills organized in a four-pillar structure (context, skills, agents, workflows) with loop-engineering audit tooling, HITL gate validation, and quality-gate CI.

plugins.name: agentic-system-architect
plugins.description: Design complete agentic configuration ecosystems (context, skills, agents, workflows), harden autonomous agents with loop-engineering controls (exit conditions, counters, self-reflection), apply ReAct reasoning patterns, and add Human-in-the-Loop approval gates with the 5-phase protocol. Ships 4 audit tools: ecosystem scaffolder, loop auditor, ReAct trace analyzer, and HITL gate validator.

plugins.name: agenthub
plugins.description: Multi-agent collaboration plugin that spawns N parallel subagents competing on the same task via git worktree isolation. Agents work independently, results are evaluated by metric or LLM judge, and the best branch is merged. Requires a git repo.

plugins.name: autoresearch-agent
plugins.description: Autonomous experiment loop that optimizes any file by a measurable metric. The agent edits a target file, runs a fixed evaluation, keeps improvements (git commit), discards failures (git reset), and loops. Requires a target file, an evaluation command that outputs a metric, and a git repo.

plugins.name: llm-cost-optimizer
plugins.description: Reduce LLM API spend, control token usage, route between models by cost/quality, implement prompt caching, and build cost observability for AI features.

plugins.name: prompt-governance
plugins.description: Manage prompts in production at scale: prompt versioning, A/B testing, prompt registries, regression prevention, and eval pipelines for production AI features.

plugins.name: self-improving-agent
plugins.description: Curate Claude Code auto-memory into durable project knowledge: analyze MEMORY.md for patterns, promote proven learnings to CLAUDE.md and .claude/rules/, extract recurring solutions into reusable skills, and check memory health and capacity.
